content:
🌟 taskt | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating repetitive, rule-based tasks across desktop and web applications without requiring deep programming knowledge.
✨ Key Features: • Free and open-source RPA client • Built in C#/.NET Framework • No-code bot design with visual designer • Element recorder and screen recorder • Automation for web and desktop applications
📖 Summary: taskt is a free and open-source Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool built with C# and the .NET Framework. It allows users to design and build automation scripts without extensive coding, featuring a visual bot designer, element recorder, and screen recorder.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
